_note: Template ASP service manifest for `onchainos agent create --role asp --service '[...]'`. Fill the endpoint field with the live Render URL of the Coach service on `hackathon/okx-asp` before running the CLI. `serviceName` and `serviceDescription` are what appears in the OKX.AI marketplace listing.

services.serviceDescription: Agent Service Provider that generates paid, deep-dive purchase insights over a user's shopping history and wishlist. Powered by a Gemini 2.5 Pro agent running on Google ADK with MongoDB and Fetch MCP tools. Every call settles a $0.01 USDC micropayment via x402 on XLayer — no wallet popup, no human sign-off. Discoverable as an A2MCP ASP; a companion A2A escrow flow is available for larger, negotiated deals.

services._note: Optional second service — A2A escrow flow via the Mesh SKILL. Uncomment once mesh contracts are live on XLayer (deployments/195.json) and the skill is deployed on Render.
services.serviceDescription: Companion escrow service for A2A deals surfaced via Coach. Locks buyer USDC in an on-chain CosellEscrow on XLayer, releases to the seller on proof of delivery, refunds otherwise. Same bytecode also live on Ethereum Sepolia and Arbitrum Sepolia for judges to inspect. release/refund is executed by a service-held authority key so the buyer wallet only signs the initial deposit.
